author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Original TV Anime 'Kemono Ou Bushin Dandivine' Announced for Fall 2026
Good Smile Company announced on Wednesday an original television anime titled Kemono Ou Bushin Dandivine (Beast King War God Dandivine) as part of the company's Gattai-shin Series (The God of Combined Series) 25th anniversary project. The official website also revealed the main cast, staff, opening theme artist, key visual (pictured), and a teaser promotional video. The anime is scheduled to premiere in October 2026. Cast Gekiha Shijima: Takuma Terashima (Edens Zero) Akane Kuzumi: Haruka Sh...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Webtoon 'Overgeared' Gets TV Anime in Fall 2026
Production company Pony Canyon opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Saenal Park and Team Argo's Overgeared webtoon on Wednesday, revealing the main cast, staff, teaser visual (pictured), and a teaser promo. The anime, titled Tempal: Item no Chikara, will premiere in October 2026. Voice actors Tatsumaru Tachibana (The God of High School) and Asami Seto (Jujutsu Kaisen) are starring as Grid and Yura, respectively. Staff Director: Ayako Kouno (Sword Art Online: Progr...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'E, Shanai System Subete One Operation Shiteiru Watashi wo Kaiko desu ka?' TV Anime Adaptation Announced
Publishing company Shufu to Seikatsusha announced a television anime adaptation of Meyuki Kashiro's E, Shanai System Subete One Operation shiteiru Watashi wo Kaiko desu ka? (Fired? But I Maintain All the Software!) manga on Wednesday. Kashiro originally began penning the series on the Shousetsuka ni Narou website in November 2020 and later continued it on Kakuyomu. Shufu no Seikatsusha began publishing the title under its Pash! Books label with illustrations by icchi in May 2021 and release...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'"Kimi wo Aisuru Ki wa Nai" to Itta Jiki Koushaku-sama ga Nazeka Dekiai shitekimasu Unveils Additional Staff, Theme Songs, First Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Kei Misawa and Natsu Mizuno's "Kimi wo Aisuru Ki wa Nai" to Itta Jiki Koushaku-sama ga Nazeka Dekiai shitekimasu (The Duke's Son Claims He Won't Love Me yet Showers Me with Adoration) manga revealed additional staff, second key visual (pictured), theme songs, and a promotional video on Wednesday. The anime is scheduled to premiere on 5 at 1:30 a.m. on TV Asahi's NUMAnimation programming block, followed by B...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Mebius Dust' Unveils Additional Cast, Staff, Ending Theme, Main Promo
The official website for the Mebius Dust television anime unveiled additional cast, staff, ending theme, a key visual, and the main promotional video on Thursday. The anime will premiere on Tokyo MX at 11.30 p.m. followed by BS Fuji and MBS on July 9. Cast Shousei: Taito Ban (Saigo ni Hitotsu dake Onegai shitemo Yoroshii deshou ka) Kai: Aoi Ichikawa (Shoushimin Series 2nd Season) Haruto: Souhei Horikane (Kaoru Hana wa Rin to Saku) Cruz: Satsumi Matsuda (Tsuihousha Shokudou e Youkoso!) Spica: Shi...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Manga 'Gifted' Gets TV Anime in 2027
Publishing company Kodansha announced a television anime adaptation of Shin Kibayashi and Rima Amamiya's Gifted manga on Thursday, revealing an announcement visual (pictured above). The anime series will premiere in 2027. Kibayashi and Amamiya began serializing the detective shoujo manga in the Nakayoshi magazine in December 2021. Kodansha published the 11th volume on January 13, with the 12th volume scheduled to be released on June 12. The series previously received a live-action televisi...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Supporting Cast Pair for 'Kabushikigaisha Magi-Lumière 2nd Season' Annoucened
The official website of the Kabushikigaisha Magi-Lumière 2nd Season (Magilumiere Magical Girls Inc. Season 2) television anime announced a supporting pair of cast on Thursday. The anime series adapting, Sekka Iwata and Yuu Aoki's mahou shoujo manga is scheduled to premiere on Nippon TV at 1:05 a.m. on July 5. Voice actors Kousuke Gotou (Dungeon Meshi) and Taketora (Jidou Hanbaiki ni Umarekawatta Ore wa Meikyuu wo Samayou) are joining the cast as Koshigaya Director-General and Directo...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Neko to Ryuu' Reveals Supporting Cast, New Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Amara's Neko to Ryuu (The Cat and the Dragon) light novel revealed supporting cast and a new promotional video on Thursday. The anime will premiere on Tokyo MX at 9:00 p.m. on July 4, followed by broadcasts on BS NTV and Yomiuri TV. Cast Haneko: Yuu Serizawa (Jidou Hanbaiki ni Umarekawatta Ore wa Meikyuu wo Samayou) Prince: Makoto Koichi (Toumei Otoko to Ningen Onna) King: Kazuya Ichijou (Akuyaku Reijou Tensei Ojisan) Jin-Gu Oh (Oo...
